insert:
authSigner := authservice.NewSigner(configSvc)
	authCipher := authservice.NewCipher(configSvc)
	authSvc := authservice.NewService(handles.Client, authSigner, authCipher)
	authMailer := mailer.New(logger)
	authMailer.Init(ctx, configSvc)
	authDeps := &handlers.Deps{Service: authSvc, Mailer: authMailer, Verifier: jwtVerifier, Logger: logger}
	r.Mount("/api/v1/auth", authDeps.Routes())
	cron.Start(ctx, handles.Client, logger)
